scans.findings: AI analysis suggests characteristics consistent with Glioma.
scans.recommendation: A significant infiltrative mass displaying contrast enhancement is localized in the left frontal lobe. Surrounding vasogenic edema is present. This result is intended as an AI-assisted screening output and should always be reviewed by a qualified neurologist or radiologist before any medical decision is made.

scans.findings: Visualized mass lesion in the right frontal lobe measuring approximately 2.4cm with surrounding vasogenic edema.
scans.recommendation: Urgent neurosurgical consultation advised. Schedule contrast-enhanced Brain MRI (Gadolinium) scan within 48 hours.
scans.clinicalNotes: Initial MRI scan. Patient exhibits mild cognitive fatigue and sensory disturbances.

scans.findings: Ventricles and sulci are within normal physiological parameters. No evidence of space-occupying lesions or mass effects.
scans.recommendation: No oncological actions required. Consult standard practitioner if non-specific headache symptoms persist.
